title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
author: openai-blog
raw_description: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
summary: GPT-5.6成为Microsoft 365 Copilot首选模型，增强Word、Excel、PowerPoint等应用的AI能力，提升工作效率和质量。
analysis_note: 模型更新提升办公效率，但技术细节有限，偏向商业化应用，价值中等。
